Function.Inference: Bass and piano vamp establish the groove before melody enters.
Main melody is introduced, played twice with slight variation.
Contrasting transition with sustained chords builds tension.
Return of the main melody, ending with a strong cadence.
Bridge material is reused to build up to final hits.

Section.Inference: Introductory vamp sets the rhythmic foundation.
Theme A features the primary syncopated melody.
Bridge builds harmonic tension with chromaticism.
Theme A returns, concluding with a full cadence.
Outro utilizes bridge material for a dramatic finish.
